title: Write a GitHub Actions Terraform Workflow
description: Write a GitHub Actions workflow YAML that implements plan-on-PR and apply-on-merge with OIDC authentication.
starterCode:
# Write a GitHub Actions workflow that:
# 1. Triggers on pull_request (branches: main) and push (branches: main)
# 2. Has permissions: id-token: write, contents: read, pull-requests: write
# 3. Uses actions/checkout@v4
# 4. Uses aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4 with:
#    - role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/GitHubActionsRole
#    - aws-region: us-east-1
# 5. Runs 'terraform init' and 'terraform validate'
# 6. On pull_request: runs 'terraform plan -out=tfplan.binary'
# 7. On push to main: runs 'terraform apply -auto-approve tfplan.binary'

name: Terraform CI/CD
solutionCode:
name: Terraform CI/CD

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  terraform:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      id-token: write
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configure AWS credentials via OIDC
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/GitHubActionsRole
          aws-region: us-east-1

      - name: Terraform Init
        run: terraform init

      - name: Terraform Validate
        run: terraform validate

      - name: Terraform Plan
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        run: terraform plan -out=tfplan.binary

      - name: Terraform Apply
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        run: terraform apply -auto-approve tfplan.binary
hints: Use 'on: pull_request: branches: [main]' and 'on: push: branches: [main]'
Apply only on main push: 'if: github.ref == "refs/heads/main"'

validationRules.errorMessage: Add id-token: write permission for OIDC

simulatedOutput.success:
Workflow validation passed!

Triggers: pull_request (main), push (main)
Permissions: id-token:write (OIDC enabled)
Steps:
  [ok] Checkout
  [ok] AWS OIDC authentication
  [ok] terraform init
  [ok] terraform validate
  [ok] terraform plan (on PR only)
  [ok] terraform apply (on push to main only)

Workflow follows GitOps best practices.
simulatedOutput.failure: Workflow validation failed. Check triggers, OIDC permissions, configure-aws-credentials action, plan/apply conditional steps, and YAML syntax.
